results.title: Server accepts negative drug quantity in prescription lines
results.patientSafetyImpact: Negative quantity can distort dosage interpretation and directly risk unsafe medication orders.

results.title: Server accepts negative billing unit price
results.patientSafetyImpact: Invalid negative billing can disrupt treatment continuity through incorrect financial eligibility and audit records.

results.title: Server accepts negative doctor experience
results.patientSafetyImpact: Corrupted provider metadata undermines trust and can mislead assignment workflows.

results.title: Server accepts clinically implausible dosage text without guardrails
results.patientSafetyImpact: Unbounded dosage input can enable unsafe medication instructions in clinical workflows.

results.title: Server accepts past-dated appointment creation
results.patientSafetyImpact: Past-date acceptance degrades schedule integrity and may cause missed/incorrect care tracking.

results.title: Cross-user direct-ID access isolation probe
results.patientSafetyImpact: Cross-user record leakage would directly violate patient confidentiality and continuity boundaries.
